lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੁਠੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਪੂਰਨ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur tutthai paaeeai pooran alakh abhev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When the True Guru is pleased, we obtain the Perfect, Unseen, Unknowable Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਸਾਚੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re saachee satigur sev |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, service to the True Guru alone is True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vittahu vaariaa jin ditaa sach naau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the True Guru, who has bestowed the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਣਾ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin sach salaahanaa sache ke gun gaau |
lines.english: Night and day, I praise the True One; I sing the Glorious Praises of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸਫਲੁ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: saas giraas na visarai safal moorat gur aap |
lines.english: With each breath and morsel of food, do not forget the Guru, the Embodiment of Fulfillment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਪੈਨਣਾ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sach khaanaa sach painanaa sache sachaa naau |2|
lines.english: True is the food, and true are the clothes, of those who chant the True Name of the True One. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਣਤਾਸਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nadar kare taa paaeeai sach naam gunataas |3|
lines.english: As He casts His Glance of Grace, we obtain the True Name, the Treasure of Excellence. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦਿਸਈ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur jevadd avar na disee aatth pehar tis jaap |
lines.english: None is seen to be as great as the Guru. Meditate on Him twenty-four hours a day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੇਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa seee naam dhiaae |
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny, meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur paramesar ek hai sabh meh rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: The Guru and the Transcendent Lord are one and the same, pervading and permeating amongst all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੪॥੩੦॥੧੦੦॥
lines.translit: naanak gur saranaagatee marai na aavai jaae |4|30|100|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Guru, who does not die, or come and go in reincarnation. ||4||30||100||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਿ ਆਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਵਾਵਣਾ ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਜਾਪੈ ਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aakh aakh man vaavanaa jiau jiau jaapai vaae |
lines.english: I speak and chant His Praises, vibrating the instrument of my mind. The more I know Him, the more I vibrate it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 ghar 1 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl, First House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਵਾਇ ਸੁਣਾਈਐ ਸੋ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis no vaae sunaaeeai so kevadd kit thaae |
lines.english: The One, unto whom we vibrate and sing-how great is He, and where is His Place?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣ ਵਾਲੇ ਜੇਤੜੇ ਸਭਿ ਆਖਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aakhan vaale jetarre sabh aakh rahe liv laae |1|
lines.english: Those who speak of Him and praise Him-they all continue speaking of Him with love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੀ ਕੇਤੜਾ ਲਿਖਿ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: teraa hukam na jaapee ketarraa likh na jaanai koe |
lines.english: The extent of Your Command cannot be seen; no one knows how to write it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਅਲਹੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa alahu agam apaar |
lines.english: O Baba, the Lord Allah is Inaccessible and Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਕੀ ਨਾਈ ਪਾਕ ਥਾਇ ਸਚਾ ਪਰਵਦਿਗਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paakee naaee paak thaae sachaa paravadigaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Sacred is His Name, and Sacred is His Place. He is the True Cherisher. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈਆ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਆਖਹਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: keemat kinai na paaeea sabh sun sun aakheh soe |2|
lines.english: No one has found Your Value; they all merely write what they have heard again and again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਸਾਇਰ ਮੇਲੀਅਹਿ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਪੁਜਾਵਹਿ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: je sau saaeir meleeeh til na pujaaveh roe |
lines.english: Even if a hundred poets met together, they could not describe even a tiny bit of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਰ ਪੈਕਾਮਰ ਸਾਲਕ ਸਾਦਕ ਸੁਹਦੇ ਅਉਰੁ ਸਹੀਦ ॥
lines.translit: peer paikaamar saalak saadak suhade aaur saheed |
lines.english: The Pirs, the Prophets, the spiritual teachers, the faithful, the innocents and the martyrs,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਖ ਮਸਾਇਕ ਕਾਜੀ ਮੁਲਾ ਦਰਿ ਦਰਵੇਸ ਰਸੀਦ ॥
lines.translit: sekh masaaeik kaajee mulaa dar daraves raseed |
lines.english: the Shaikhs, the mystics, the Qazis, the Mullahs and the Dervishes at His Door

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਕਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਅਗਲੀ ਪੜਦੇ ਰਹਨਿ ਦਰੂਦ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: barakat tin kau agalee parrade rehan darood |3|
lines.english: -they are blessed all the more as they continue reading their prayers in praise to Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਸਾਜੇ ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਢਾਹੇ ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਦੇਵੈ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: puchh na saaje puchh na dtaahe puchh na devai lee |
lines.english: He seeks no advice when He builds; He seeks no advice when He destroys. He seeks no advice while giving or taking.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਵੇਖੈ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa vekhai nadar kar jai bhaavai tai dee |4|
lines.english: He beholds all in His Vision. He gives to those with whom He is pleased. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਣੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapanee kudarat aape jaanai aape karan karee |
lines.english: He alone knows His Creative Power; He Himself does all deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਵਸੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਸੋ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਹੈ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jithai vasai meraa paatisaahu so kevadd hai thaau |
lines.english: How great is that place where my Sovereign Lord dwells?

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਵਾ ਨਾਵ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਵਾ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: thaavaa naav na jaaneeeh naavaa kevadd naau |
lines.english: His Place and His Name are not known, no one knows how great is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਨਾ ਵਰਨ ਨ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਜੇ ਕਿਸੈ ਵਡਾ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: varanaa varan na bhaavanee je kisai vaddaa karee |
lines.english: One class of people does not like the other, when one has been made great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਬੜਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਹਉ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਪੁਛਣਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: anbarr koe na sakee hau kis no puchhan jaau |5|
lines.english: No one can reach it; whom shall I go and ask? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੇ ਹਥਿ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: vadde hath vaddiaaeea jai bhaavai tai dee |
lines.english: Greatness is only in His Great Hands; He gives to those with whom He is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ਆਪਣੈ ਚਸਾ ਨ ਢਿਲ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: hukam savaare aapanai chasaa na dtil karee |6|
lines.english: By the Hukam of His Command, He Himself regenerates, without a moment's delay. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਦੇ ਕੈ ਰਹਿਆ ਸੁਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kevadd daataa aakheeai de kai rahiaa sumaar |
lines.english: How great should we call the Giver? His Gifts are beyond estimation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਆਖੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਲੈਣੈ ਕੈ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko aakhai bahut bahut lainai kai veechaar |
lines.english: Everyone cries out, "More! More!", with the idea of receiving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਤੇਰੇ ਜੁਗਹ ਜੁਗਹ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥੭॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tott na aavee tere jugah jugah bhanddaar |7|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, there is no deficiency; Your Storehouses are filled to overflowing, age after age. ||7||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਕੰਤ ਮਹੇਲੀਆ ਸਗਲੀਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe kant maheleea sagaleea kareh seegaar |
lines.english: All are brides of the Husband Lord; all decorate themselves for Him.
